---
title: "NCBI data and metadata"
format: html
---

# NCBI SRA data accession and metadata extraction

## Load packages

```{r}
#| label: packages
library(rentrez)
library(xml2)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(purrr)
library(dplyr)
library(here)
library(lubridate)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(viridis)
library(nhdplusTools)
```

## Query NCBI

```{r}
#| label: search for this BioProject as a test case
search_result <- entrez_search(db = "bioproject", term = "PRJNA1458311[PRJA]")

```

```{r}
#| label: fetch the full record in XML
xml_data <- entrez_fetch(db = "bioproject", id = search_result$ids, rettype = "xml")

# parse XML string into an R object
parsed_xml <- read_xml(xml_data)

#check output
print(parsed_xml)

#view output
cat(substr(as.character(parsed_xml), 1, 2000))

```

```{r}
#| label: fetch and parse sample-level metadata

# find the associated BioSample IDs
links <- entrez_link(dbfrom = "bioproject", id = search_result$ids, db = "biosample")
biosample_ids <- links$links$bioproject_biosample

# fetch the raw XML for these sample IDs
samples_xml_raw <- entrez_fetch(db = "biosample", id = biosample_ids, rettype = "xml")
samples_xml <- read_xml(samples_xml_raw)

# find individual sample nodes
sample_nodes <- xml_find_all(samples_xml, ".//BioSample")

# build the data frame
sample_df <- data.frame(
  biosample = xml_attr(sample_nodes, "accession"),
  Site_Name = xml_text(xml_find_first(sample_nodes, ".//Title")),
  
  # use harmonized names for reliability
  Date      = xml_text(xml_find_first(sample_nodes, ".//Attribute[@harmonized_name='collection_date']")),
  Lat_Lon   = xml_text(xml_find_first(sample_nodes, ".//Attribute[@harmonized_name='lat_lon']")),
  
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

# preview sample-level spreadsheet
print(sample_df)

```

```{r}
#| label: make data frame DwC compliant

# input EML derived dataframe
dwc_df <- sample_df %>%
  mutate(verbatimCoordinates = Lat_Lon,
    
    decimalLatitude = as.numeric(format(round(as.numeric(str_extract(Lat_Lon, "^[0-9.]+")), 4), nsmall = 4)),
    
    decimalLongitude = as.numeric(format(round(as.numeric(str_extract(Lat_Lon, "[0-9.]+(?=\\s*[EW])")), 4), nsmall = 4)),
    decimalLongitude = if_else(str_detect(Lat_Lon, "W"), decimalLongitude * -1, decimalLongitude),
  
    geodeticDatum = "WGS84"
  )  %>%
  # rename remaining columns in DwC
  rename(
    locality = Site_Name,
    eventDate = Date
  ) %>%
  # keep only the standardized DwC columns (drop Lat_Lon)
  select(biosample, locality, eventDate, decimalLatitude, decimalLongitude, geodeticDatum, verbatimCoordinates)

# preview DwC compliant table
print(dwc_df)
```
```{r}
#| label: clean and standardize localities for plotting
# apply locality cleaning pipeline
clean_dwc_df <- dwc_df %>%
  mutate(
    # move original locality string to a verbatim column
    verbatimLocality = locality,
    # fix any shorthand 'R' or 'R.' to 'River' using word boundaries
    clean_locality = str_replace_all(locality, "\\bR\\b\\.?", "River"),
    # split on connector works and symbols (@, near, off, at)
    river_part    = str_split_i(clean_locality, "\\s+(?i)(@|near|off|at)\\s+", 1),
    landmark_part = str_split_i(clean_locality, "\\s+(?i)(@|near|off|at)\\s+", 2),
    # build standardized localities
    standardized_locality = if_else(
      !is.na(landmark_part) & landmark_part != "",
      paste0(river_part, ", ", landmark_part),
      river_part
    )
  ) %>%
  select(-locality, -clean_locality, -river_part, -landmark_part) %>%
  rename(locality = standardized_locality) %>%
  relocate(locality, .after = eventDate)
  ```

```{r}
#| label: query sample metadata from bioproject PRJNA1458311 using the run field (SRR)
# includes PRJNA and SAMN to later join with site metadata

# search SRA for all runs in PRJNA1458311
search_results <- entrez_search(
  db          = "sra",
  term        = "PRJNA1458311[BioProject]",
  use_history = TRUE
)

cat("Found", search_results$count, "runs\n")

# fetch XML records (batches of 50)
batch_size <- 50
n_records  <- search_results$count

xml_records <- map(
  seq(0, n_records - 1, by = batch_size),
  ~ entrez_fetch(
      db          = "sra",
      web_history = search_results$web_history,
      rettype     = "xml",
      retstart    = .x,
      retmax      = batch_size
    )
)

# parse a single XML experiment package
parse_sra_record <- function(pkg) {
  
  get_text <- function(node, xpath) {
    result <- xml_find_first(node, xpath)
    if (is.na(result)) NA_character_ else xml_text(result)
  }
  get_attr <- function(node, xpath, attr) {
    result <- xml_find_first(node, xpath)
    if (is.na(result)) NA_character_ else xml_attr(result, attr)
  }
  
  tibble(
    # accessions
    run        = get_attr(pkg, ".//RUN",        "accession"),
    bioproject = get_attr(pkg, ".//STUDY_REF", "accession"),
    sraStudy   = get_attr(pkg, ".//STUDY",      "accession"),
    biosample  = get_text(pkg, ".//EXTERNAL_ID[starts-with(text(), 'SAMN')]"),
    srs        = get_attr(pkg, ".//SAMPLE",     "accession"),
    srx        = get_attr(pkg, ".//EXPERIMENT", "accession"),

    # run stats
    spots      = get_attr(pkg, ".//RUN", "total_spots"),
    bases      = get_attr(pkg, ".//RUN", "total_bases"),
    sizeMB     = get_attr(pkg, ".//RUN", "size"),
    published  = substr(get_attr(pkg, ".//RUN", "published"), 1, 10),

    # library / experiment (DwC DNA extension)
    libraryName      = get_text(pkg, ".//LIBRARY_NAME"),
    sequencingMethod = get_text(pkg, ".//PLATFORM//*"),
    libraryStrategy  = get_text(pkg, ".//LIBRARY_STRATEGY"),
    librarySource    = get_text(pkg, ".//LIBRARY_SOURCE"),
    librarySelection = get_text(pkg, ".//LIBRARY_SELECTION"),
    libraryLayout = xml_name(xml_find_first(pkg, ".//LIBRARY_LAYOUT/*")),
    libraryDesign    = get_text(pkg, ".//DESIGN_DESCRIPTION"),

    # add primers here later (DwC DNA extension) ─────────────────────────────────
    #primerNameForward  = NA_character_,  # e.g. "515F"
    #pcr_primer_forward = NA_character_,  # e.g. "GTGYCAGCMGCCGCGGTAA"
    #primerNameReverse  = NA_character_,  # e.g. "806R"
    #pcr_primer_reverse = NA_character_,  # e.g. "GGACTACNVGGGTWTCTAAT"
  )
}

# parse all batches
sra_df <- xml_records %>%
  map(~ {
    doc  <- read_xml(.x)
    pkgs <- xml_find_all(doc, "//EXPERIMENT_PACKAGE")
    map_dfr(pkgs, parse_sra_record)
  }) %>%
  list_rbind() %>%
# add sampleID and targetGene by extracting from library name
mutate(
    sampleID = sub("_.*", "", libraryName),
    targetGene = sub(".*_", "", libraryName)
  )
```

```{r}
PRJNA1458311_metadata <- sra_df %>%
  left_join(clean_dwc_df, by = "biosample")
```

## quick map didn't work
```{r}
# check data
map_PRJNA1458311_metadata <- PRJNA1458311_metadata %>%
  mutate(
    decimalLongitude = as.numeric(decimalLongitude),
    decimalLatitude  = as.numeric(decimalLatitude),
    eventDate = as.Date(eventDate),
    year = factor(lubridate::year(eventDate)),
    targetGene = factor(targetGene)
  )

summary(map_PRJNA1458311_metadata$decimalLongitude)
summary(map_PRJNA1458311_metadata$decimalLatitude)
```

```{r}

# data prep
map_PRJNA1458311_metadata <- PRJNA1458311_metadata %>%
  mutate(
    decimalLongitude = as.numeric(decimalLongitude),
    decimalLatitude  = as.numeric(decimalLatitude),
    eventDate = as.Date(eventDate),
    year = factor(year(eventDate)),
    targetGene = factor(targetGene)
  )

# California basemap (NO hires package)
ca <- ne_states(
  country = "United States of America",
  returnclass = "sf"
) %>%
  filter(name == "California")

ggplot() +
  geom_sf(data = ca, fill = "grey95", color = "grey70") +

  geom_point(
    data = map_PRJNA1458311_metadata,
    aes(decimalLongitude, decimalLatitude,
        color = year,
        shape = targetGene),
    size = 3,
    alpha = 0.9,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.01, height = 0.01)
  ) +

  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-122.4, -121.0),
    ylim = c(37.5, 38.6),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +

  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "C", end = 0.9) +
  theme_minimal()
  ```

  ## try map again still not working
  ```{r}
  # bounding box around Delta
bbox <- c(
  xmin = -122.4,
  ymin = 37.5,
  xmax = -121.0,
  ymax = 38.6
)

nhd_flow <- nhdplusTools::get_nhdplus(
  bbox = bbox,
  realization = "flowline",
  simplified = TRUE
)

map_PRJNA1458311_metadata <- PRJNA1458311_metadata %>%
  mutate(
    decimalLongitude = as.numeric(decimalLongitude),
    decimalLatitude  = as.numeric(decimalLatitude),
    eventDate = as.Date(eventDate),
    year = factor(year(eventDate)),
    targetGene = factor(targetGene)
  )

  ggplot() +

  # REAL rivers/sloughs
  geom_sf(
    data = nhd_flow,
    color = "steelblue",
    linewidth = 0.4,
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +

  # your samples
  geom_point(
    data = map_PRJNA1458311_metadata,
    aes(
      decimalLongitude,
      decimalLatitude,
      color = year,
      shape = targetGene
    ),
    size = 3.5,
    alpha = 0.9,
    position = position_jitter(width = 0.01, height = 0.01)
  ) +

  coord_sf(
    xlim = c(-122.4, -121.0),
    ylim = c(37.5, 38.6),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +

  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "C", end = 0.9) +
  theme_minimal()
```
